scripts.prebuild: npm run verify && node scripts/check-no-old-preview-url.mjs && node scripts/copy-pdf-worker.mjs
scripts.prebuild:frontend: npm run verify && node scripts/check-no-old-preview-url.mjs && node scripts/copy-pdf-worker.mjs
scripts.prebuild:vercel: npm run verify && node scripts/check-no-old-preview-url.mjs && node scripts/copy-pdf-worker.mjs
scripts.build: npm run verify && vite build && esbuild server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --packages=external --sourcemap --outfile=dist/server.cjs
scripts.build:backend: npm run verify && vite build && esbuild server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --packages=external --sourcemap --outfile=dist/server.cjs
scripts.bundle:vercel: esbuild server.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --format=esm --define:process.env.NODE_ENV='"production"' --minify-whitespace --legal-comments=eof --metafile=vercel-runtime/server.meta.json --banner:js="// Generated by npm run bundle:vercel. Do not edit." --outfile=vercel-runtime/server.mjs && node scripts/verify-vercel-runtime.mjs
scripts.test: npm run test:sources && npm run test:security && npm run test:video
